resolution_summary: Fixed in EXP-468-HOL-MISSING-c2-reactive-prose-pattern.json. Changed 'the only OpenTimestamps anchor on the dome site is the one on status_history.json that bundles prediction and observation fields per commit' to 'no OpenTimestamps proof anchoring a predictions-only document has been published since the structural critique was raised.' Accurately scopes the OTS claim to predictions-only anchors; does not overstate the total count of dome OTS files.
action_for_decider: integrate EXP-468 (now revised); close ISS-2404 as resolved
